generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated security laws leave us vulnerable. The 2024 Boston attack showed what happens when agencies can't share intelligence fast enough. We need to expand domestic security powers - not for surveillance, but to stop threats before they materialize. The civil liberties debate is important, but we can't afford to wait until the next attack happens. #SecurityFirst #LearnFromHistory
